posts.text: Hi yes some companies are there which you can look so some giant companies are there and some small cap companies are there like bansal wires so track down and check and the some many other companies are there.

posts.author: Khanna0508
posts.text: Hi, Any value buying in wires and cables space? In my POV, india is going through a power revolution so this space should have good growth potential. Some names worthy as per my understanding are KEI Industries, RR CABLES and segment leader Polycab. Kindly suggest TIA!!
